steps.title: Substitute into the function definition
steps.content:
We have $g(x) = 6x$ and need to find $x$ when $g(x) = 54$. Substitute 54 for $g(x)$:
$$6x = 54$$

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $9$. It's given that $g\left(x\right)=6x$. Substituting $54$ for $g\left(x\right)$ in the given function yields $54=6x$. Dividing both sides of this equation by $6$ yields $x=9$. Therefore, the value of $x$ when $g\left(x\right)=54$ is $9$.
